title: Supporting material for "Scientists should not increase the overall n by default when including both sexes in in vivo studies: evidence from statistical simulations"
author: Phillips, Benjamin
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Supporting material for manuscript "Scientists should not increase the overall n by default when including both sexes in in vivo studies: evidence from statistical simulations" 

 Includes underlying data and scripts to enable reproducible analysis.
